# Version 4.150.2 (Unreleased)
> **Upstream engine bug fixes**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.150.2 merges upstream chrome/m150 bug fixes from Skia into the 4.150 servicing line.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **chrome/m150 upstream bug fixes merged** — Stability and correctness patches from the Skia team's chrome/m150 branch have been backported into the 4.150 servicing release. ([#4517](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4517))
